ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the component type */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the component */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or use of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the supplier */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's product page */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for the component */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the component */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_purchase_price" REAL /* Price of the last purchase */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type FOREIGN KEY ("component_type") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "average_delivery_time" INTEGER /* Average delivery time in days */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component for the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the component at the specified quantity */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the price is effective */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for the quantity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pricing is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the component is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the component */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the component */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "next_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next delivery */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is critical for production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component purchased */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the component */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number for the purchase */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., ordered, received, pending) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purchase has been paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in production */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the component was used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the component was used in */,
  "work_order_number" TEXT /* Work order number for the usage */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who used the component */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the usage is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, engineer, warehouse staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component or inventory */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component or inventory accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, purchase) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the default image for the component */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_images_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, application note) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is confidential */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., price change, inventory update) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
